{{Infobox character
| name = Albadol Crane
| aliases = Crane
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = alchemist
| abilities = crossing a mad Reader's Intent with unhinged alchemical poisons
| affiliations = Imperial Guilds, Magisters, Guild of Alchemists
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Albadol Crane, also known as Crane, is a deceptive individual who successfully infiltrated two different [[Imperial Guilds]] through forgery and lies. He initially posed as a member of the nobility with an Academy background to train under the [[Magisters]], but he fled before his fraud was discovered. He later spent five years embedded within [[Kanatalia]], the [[Guild]] of [[Alchemists]], without being detected. His tenure with the alchemists ended after his supposed miracle elixir was linked to the disappearance of several acolytes. Following his dismissal, he relocated to an ancient castle in the [[Aurelian countryside]]. In this location, he conducted experiments that combined alchemical poisons with the [[Intent]] of a mad [[Reader]]. Crane utilized a copper staff capable of discharging blue-white sparks and carried a [[pistol]]. Within his castle, he engineered massive, ten-foot-tall creatures constructed from lab-grown human components and enhanced with [[alchemy]] and armor.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Albadol Crane was an alchemist who gained training under the [[Magisters]] by falsifying his noble lineage and Academy education. After successfully deceiving these instructors, he joined the [[Guild]] of [[Alchemists]] in [[Kanatalia]]. His laboratory work involved constructing ten-foot monstrosities from human parts and experimenting with unhinged alchemical poisons crossed with a mad [[Reader]]'s [[Intent]]. Following the production of a miracle elixir that coincided with the disappearance of several acolytes, Crane was arrested and dismissed by the guild members.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Albadol Crane]] is an alchemist who deceived two [[Imperial Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Albadol Crane]] trained under the [[Magisters]] by faking an Academy education and noble lineage.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Albadol Crane]] joined the [[Guild]] of [[Alchemists]] in [[Kanatalia]] after deceiving the [[Magisters]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Albadol Crane]] was dismissed and arrested by the alchemists after his miracle elixir coincided with the disappearance of acolytes.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Albadol Crane]]'s experiments involved crossing a mad [[Reader]]'s [[Intent]] with unhinged alchemical poisons.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Crane is an alchemist who built ten-foot monstrosities out of human parts in his lab.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|After the fourth release of Albadol Crane’s “miracle elixir” coincided with the fourth disappearance of Guild acolytes, the alchemists called for his dismissal and arrest.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Imperial Guilds]]
[[Category:Magisters]]
[[Category:Alchemists]]
[[Category:Readers]]
